overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning in an open plaza beneath an elevated highway with glowing digital billboards, proceeding through a triangular archway with red neon lighting, and continuing into a covered tunnel roadway with wet reflective asphalt and passing vehicles. The footage exhibits high-fidelity game engine rendering characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza under elevated highway with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward a distant triangular archway, passing large digital billboards on the right

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertising screen displaying animated content on the right side of the plaza
massive elevated highway deck spanning across the top of the frame with support columns
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers with neon lights visible in the background
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a wide urban plaza beneath an elevated highway at night. A large digital billboard glows on the right while the wet concrete ground reflects the ambient neon light. The camera moves forward toward a distant archway, with a futuristic skyline visible beyond the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: triangular pedestrian archway with red neon accent lighting

events.description: entering the triangular archway structure from the open plaza, moving into a more enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered archway passage with red neon lights lining the left wall

entered.detail: angular concrete passageway with triangular cross-section forming a pedestrian tunnel
horizontal red neon tubes mounted along the left wall of the archway
modern building facade with illuminated green-tinted windows visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow triangular archway passage illuminated by red neon strips on the left wall. The space is enclosed and sheltered, with a building featuring green-lit windows visible ahead. The overhead highway structure looms closer as the camera progresses through the concrete corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban roadway with pedestrian walkway and vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting the archway into a covered tunnel roadway with asphalt surface and moving vehicle traffic
overtaking a pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk of the covered road, overtaking a pedestrian while vehicles pass by on the right

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction, then being passed by ego

entered.detail: enclosed road tunnel with asphalt surface and yellow lane markings running along the ground
smooth gray concrete retaining wall with vertical windows emitting green light
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: Exiting the archway, the scene transitions to a covered roadway tunnel with asphalt ground. The camera walks along a sidewalk next to a concrete wall with green-lit windows while vehicles pass by on the right. A pedestrian is overtaken on the walkway as the tunnel extends ahead with overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep covered tunnel with continuous vehicle traffic and structural beams

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily through the tunnel interior with occasional vehicles passing by on the right

entered.detail: heavy concrete support beams crossing the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds deeper into the tunnel section, passing structural overhead beams. The concrete walls recede to the left mid-ground while vehicles continue to pass sporadically on the right. The environment remains consistently lit by overhead fixtures with wet asphalt reflecting the artificial light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, neon-lit urban plaza into the enclosed depths of a futuristic roadway tunnel. It begins beneath an elevated highway, moving across wet concrete that reflects the glow of a large digital billboard toward a distant architectural opening. As the camera progresses, the open plaza narrows into a sheltered triangular archway illuminated by red neon strips, bringing the heavy concrete structure of the overpass into closer view. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the archway and enters a covered tunnel, walking along a sidewalk past green-lit windows while vehicles pass on the adjacent asphalt. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the tunnel, passing under structural overhead beams as the artificial lighting reflects off the damp ground.
